_comment: Recommended permission rules to pair with ship-workflow. A plugin CANNOT install these — copy the deny/ask arrays into your own ~/.claude/settings.json (or .claude/settings.json in a project) under "permissions". These keep dangerous moments gated while most work runs hands-free. 'defaultMode':'auto' is what makes the workflow run without per-step approval prompts; omit it if you prefer to approve manually. The two Edit/Write entries in 'ask' are PLACEHOLDERS — replace the path with a shared main checkout you want agents to ask before editing directly, or delete them.
